# terrible_community_general_ldap_inc (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `attribute` (String) The attribute to increment.
- `dn` (String) The DN entry containing the attribute to increment.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `increment` (Number) The value of the increment to apply.
- `method` (String) If `auto`, the module determines automatically the method to use. If `rfc4525` or `legacy` force to use the corresponding method.

### Read-Only

- `incremented` (Boolean) It is set to `true` if the attribute value has changed.
- `rfc4525` (Boolean) Is `true` if the method used to increment is based on RFC4525, `false` if legacy.
- `value` (String) The new value after incrementing.
